prompt: 用一句话解释稀疏专家模型。

resident.prompt: 用一句话解释稀疏专家模型。

provider_storage.policy: all routed experts resident in fused layer buffers

expert_provider.policy: all routed experts resident in fused layer buffers

streaming.prompt: 用一句话解释稀疏专家模型。

provider_storage.policy: routed experts loaded on demand through ExpertCache

expert_provider.policy: routed experts loaded on demand through ExpertCache

boundary: C3-R and C3-S use the same text-only memory-native model, SparseFlow expert module, dispatch order, eager BF16 kernel, KV cache, and greedy generation loop; only the expert provider differs.
